---
name: Bug report
about: Report a spec defect, documentation inconsistency, or broken repository workflow
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Provide a concise description of the problem.

## Type of issue
- Normative specification defect
- Architecture inconsistency
- Conformance or test gap
- Diagram or documentation error
- Repository workflow or tooling problem
- Other (describe)

## Location
List the affected file(s), section heading(s), ADR(s), or workflow.

## Current behavior
Describe what is incorrect, ambiguous, contradictory, or broken.

## Expected behavior
Describe the intended behavior, requirement, or repository outcome.

## Why this matters
Explain the impact on privacy, security, governance, interoperability, conformance, or contributor usability.

## Evidence
Include supporting references, screenshots, failing links, or related issues if available.

## Proposed correction
Optional. Describe a concrete fix if you have one.

## Additional context
Add any assumptions, affected profile(s), or reviewer considerations.
